hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Durable tombstone index authority vs runtime mount-probe surface, ord_h5 replay ordering, and emit_z2 cross-format rules must be inferred from Rust sources and rebuild experiments, not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Driver slots, pack_v4 refresh, mix_q3 fold, ord_h5 combine ordering, and emit_z2 witness layer interact; no single crate exposes the full skew_report contract or held-out permutation survival.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: adversarial_generalization constraint-complete framing gives complete output schema and generalization obligation while withholding which subsystem mis-orders replay or skips tomb witness cross-checks.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spreads controls across m5/k85, p10/y5, p10/y4, and p10/core with overlapping false-green and permutation traps.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Filesystem recovery generation skew with tombstone revival ordering under partial crash/restart workflows is distributed-systems state-recovery domain reasoning, not a textbook algorithm.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Even with full report schema disclosed, choosing tombstone authority and replay order remains non-trivial inference across four crate roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupted slot row; multiple slots and held-out perm_replay scenarios disagree until global semantics align.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Static JSON, Cargo.lock swap, or one TOML edit cannot satisfy ablation, permutation, and pipeline overwrite tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises primary slots, echo pairs, held-out perm_replay permutations, and consecutive runs — fix must generalize beyond enumerated primary rows.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint contract does not name broken functions, replay phase ordering, or authority split.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is semantic reconciliation and adversarial permutation survival, not anti-cheat alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a timeout/deps-only task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four-location flipping contract blocks one-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates four modules plus patch, not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix is procedural across Rust modules, not one manifest table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns banned from fix-path symbols; opaque m5/p10 roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys rhyme structurally without validate/repair stems matching prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No standard recipe for tombstone revival generation skew in this bespoke offline workspace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is crash-recovery and authority semantics, not security theater.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Authority, replay order, cross-format emit, and permutation generalization trade off rather than independent bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cargo/docker realism is scaffolding; assessed hardness is cross-crate coupling and held-out permutations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cannot infer idx_m6 vs mnt_probe precedence or replay order without rebuild, echo-pair comparison, and permutation tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Targets senior engineers managing offline filesystem recovery and tombstone reconciliation, not undergrad single-patch tasks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three concrete discoveries beyond instruction surface.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: instruction_specificity.level is constraint-complete with solution strategy open.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration documents three multi-site coordination patterns each requiring three or more coordinated components.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic cargo rebuild, tr driver run, JSON assertions, permutation suite, and ablation patches.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public skew_report schema, coherence rules, and generalization obligation are complete; fix sites withheld.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can close four-crate semantics within hours using overlay mold.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires state_recovery_crash_consistency, generation skew during filesystem recovery, and multi-crate Cargo literacy.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: False-green recovery probes and tombstone revival skew occur in real distributed filesystem postmortems.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report, permutation survival, and rebuild pipeline, not a mandated edit recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Complete report contract and generalization rule do not reveal tombstone authority, replay ordering site, or emit_z2 bypass; solver must read workspace and run experiments.

discovery_budget.discovery: Durable tombstone index in p10/y6/idx_m6.rs remains authoritative for revival ordering while m5 driver and p10/core/mnt_probe answer runtime-visible mount state first after partial filesystem recovery.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the authority split collapses search to wiring index reads into the driver.

discovery_budget.discovery: ord_h5 marks dsk_rc/gen_rc true on an intermediate replay pass before twist_m6/phase ordering finishes, producing false-green closure while echo slots disagree.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing replay phase ordering reveals the false-green mechanism directly.

discovery_budget.discovery: emit_z2 fast path materializes JSON facets without cross-checking tomb_wit.json against environment/data TOML/TSV seeds and pack-merged storage.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Pointing at the bypass path turns cross-format invariant into a one-file guard add.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction states complete skew_report schema, build/replay commands, coherence predicates, and adversarial generalization obligation but withholds implementation mapping and broken subsystem identities.

attack_path.summary: Agents may hardcode trace_digest, hand-write JSON, patch only mnt_probe, or fix primary slots while ignoring held-out perm_replay permutations.
attack_path.reasoning: Cheap wins satisfy superficial shape tests until pipeline overwrite, permutation, echo-pair, and ablation suites exercise rebuild semantics.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate mix_q3 lineage fold, pack_v4 storage refresh, ord_h5 ordering, and emit_z2 tomb witness cross-check.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each change sounds local but flipping-point shows isolated reverts fail distinct test subsets.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure residual work is reconciling authority, replay order, and cross-format regeneration under held-out permutations — not mapping each public rule to one obvious module. Part F: platform Part E classification applies only after successful agent+verifier cycles; local construction targets worst-model pass rate <= 20%.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest schema disclosure, solver still reconciles idx_m6 vs mnt_probe, false-green gauge_m6 closure, cross-format regeneration, and permutation generalization across four crates.

topology_enumeration.summary: Authority topology coordinates tombstone index, pack_v4 refresh, and driver slot wiring.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Index-only edits leave pack storage stale; pack-only fixes ignore probe/index precedence; driver-only tweaks cannot fix durable tombstone index.

topology_enumeration.summary: Replay-order topology coordinates ord_h5, twist_m6 primitive, and mix_q3 fold.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Ord ordering without twist_m6 helper reverts; mix_q3 fold alone cannot fix premature closure flags or permutation failures.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format topology coordinates emit_z2, tomb witness, and data seeds.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emit-only guards miss pack bytes; witness-only edits without emit_z2 cross-check leave mnt_rc/gen_rc skew.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn mix_q3(step_ix: usize, family_ix: u32, prev_family: u32) -> u64
symbol_table.purpose: Folds step and family tags into stamp bits for report facets.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn pack_v4(state: &mut PackState, incoming: &PackState, stamp_b: u32) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Merges incoming pack bytes into durable storage during bind steps.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn ord_h5(gate_first: bool, side: impl FnMut(), gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Orders side-effect callbacks during per-slot combine steps under replay.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn twist_m6(gate_first: bool, mut side: impl FnMut(), mut gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Low-level side/gate ordering primitive used by ord_h5.
Cross-checks facet material against durable tomb witness bytes.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Buffers ephemeral combine events for offline benchmarks unrelated to replay combine ordering.
Applies offline fold transforms for diagnostics without participating in stamp authority.
Formats human-readable summaries for support tooling without tomb witness cross-check.
Tomb blob parsing helpers co-resident with witness slow path; not a standalone flip location.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Instruction names observable skew_report contract and mirror binds; tests require bind agreement

difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Ablation test reverts fold and expects incoherence

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/p10/core/src/gauge_m6.rs intermediate closure counters before replay completes

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/p10/y4/src/pack_v4.rs after partial recovery; idx_m6 vs mnt_probe
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: mnt_rc reads 1 while gen_rc/dsk_rc diverge after partial filesystem recovery

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/p10/core/src/emit_z2.rs vs tomb_wit.json and data seeds
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: JSON shape passes without tomb witness cross-check against TOML/TSV seeds
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Pipeline rebuild tests test_s10_fresh_emit and test_s17_ablate_wit

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: environment/docs/operator_cmds.txt argv consumed by tr filesystem replay hook
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: Agents run generic cargo loops without documented replay argv sequence

calibration_plan.human_sanity: derive trace_digest from m5/k85 main.rs header; run operator_cmds hook sequence; one careful human can satisfy using notes.md and bundled fixtures only
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, pytest edits, digest hardcode, hand-edited tomb witness, skip cargo; verifier-offline pytest/cargo baked in Dockerfile; test.sh performs no runtime network installs under allow_internet=false
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: revert mix_q3 only, pack_v4 only, ord_h5 only, emit_z2 only — each drops pass rate on disjoint test subsets; remove test_s16_all_extras and expect easier pass rate

pass_rate_target.basis: frontier agents; Part E post-upload Hard/Medium/Easy classification on worst/best model accuracy

skew_report schema, facet format, trace_digest derivation matches driver header
Output path and summary fields present with rows_total matching primary+echo slots

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt is 1 only when all semantic pytest passes including test_s16_all_extras

subtype_milestone_plan.sequential_dependency: single-step cross-test coupling via permutations and ablations
subtype_milestone_plan.sidecar_or_protocol_notes: single-container Rust workspace; fixtures under environment/data only; no network services

fix_frontier.distribution: environment/p10/y5/src/mix_q3.rs, environment/p10/y4/src/pack_v4.rs, environment/m5/k85/src/ord_h5.rs, environment/p10/core/src/emit_z2.rs (distinct roots m5, p10/y5, p10/y4, p10/core)
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque identifiers on neutral m5/p10 roots; no instruction nouns on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Co-resident crate roots and rhyming decoys perform credible adjacent work; frontier stays thin at four fix symbols

forbidden_assertion_styles: readiness fields named *_ok in instruction prose tied 1:1 to fix-path grep

task_shape.hardness_source: adversarial generalization across conflicting recovery evidence surfaces under destructive replay and partial filesystem recovery
task_shape.collapse_risk: Leaking canonical recovery path, replay phase ordering, or tombstone-index vs mount-probe authority collapses to a local one-crate patch

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: partial recovery/restart workflow, durability guarantee for skew_report artifact, recovery/rebuild command surface, post-recovery observable state, mirror pairs, trace_digest formula home in main.rs header, slot_ids.txt primary table, existence of perm_replay generalization rule, operator_cmds replay argv
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: journal/checkpoint internals, broken recovery phase, corrupt record location, replay function names, cleanup path, exact phase ordering, patch functions, emit bypass site, canonical recovery sequence, per-slot facet answers
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Partial writes, replay, cleanup, idempotent rerun safety, and restart-after-partial-recovery must coordinate; durable tombstone index must diverge from runtime-visible mount probes until all four fix roots align; held-out permutations must survive
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: nondeterministic crash timing, hidden snapshot expectations, verifier reading private internals, single stale-file repair shortcut, clean-build-only pass
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds state_recovery_crash_consistency adversarial_generalization coverage for generation skew during filesystem recovery using the approved overlay Cargo mold with distinct tombstone/slot semantics

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: low — neutral m5/p10 roots and opaque symbols (mix_q3, pack_v4, ord_h5, emit_z2)
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: low — tests derive verdicts from trace_digest recompute and bind equality, not per-slot answer tables in instruction
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low — four substantive Rust modules plus explicit flipping-point contract
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: medium — held-out permutations in perm_replay.toml; instruction states existence and generalization rule only

actionability_plan.source_fix_intent_visible: yes — repair under /app without naming modules
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: skew_report.json path, mirror pairs, coherent predicates, regeneration requirement
actionability_plan.schema_home: instruction public contract; optional environment/schemas/skew_row.schema.json for author lint only

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Overlay mold keeps contracts observation-shaped with solver-visible formula homes; deterministic offline Cargo rebuilds

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: Construction follows approved accepted tasks/overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind.zip (overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind) for verifier shape, flipping-point ablations, workspace+driver pipeline traps, and three-plus crate flipping-point discipline; reframed from overlay lowerdir repair to adversarial_generalization generation skew during filesystem recovery + state_recovery_crash_consistency with held-out perm_replay permutations. No promoted entry in docs/reference_tasks/index.json matches this exact profile combo; abi-rebuild-mismatch covers multi-crate regeneration discipline only.

realism_source.minimization_preserves: Durable tombstone index vs runtime mount probe divergence, intermediate gauge closure before replay completes, JSON fast path without tomb_wit cross-check, held-out ordering rows in perm_replay.toml

fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque identifiers on neutral m5/p10 roots; no instruction nouns on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Co-resident crate roots and rhyming decoys perform credible adjacent work; frontier stays thin at four fix symbols

forbidden_assertion_styles: readiness fields named *_ok in instruction prose tied 1:1 to fix-path grep

task_shape.hardness_source: adversarial generalization across conflicting recovery evidence surfaces under destructive replay and partial filesystem recovery
task_shape.collapse_risk: Leaking canonical recovery path, replay phase ordering, or tombstone-index vs mount-probe authority collapses to a local one-crate patch

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: partial recovery/restart workflow, durability guarantee for skew_report artifact, recovery/rebuild command surface, post-recovery observable state, mirror pairs, trace_digest formula home in main.rs header, slot_ids.txt primary table, existence of perm_replay generalization rule, operator_cmds replay argv
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: journal/checkpoint internals, broken recovery phase, corrupt record location, replay function names, cleanup path, exact phase ordering, patch functions, emit bypass site, canonical recovery sequence, per-slot facet answers
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Partial writes, replay, cleanup, idempotent rerun safety, and restart-after-partial-recovery must coordinate; durable tombstone index must diverge from runtime-visible mount probes until all four fix roots align; held-out permutations must survive
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: nondeterministic crash timing, hidden snapshot expectations, verifier reading private internals, single stale-file repair shortcut, clean-build-only pass
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds state_recovery_crash_consistency adversarial_generalization coverage for generation skew during filesystem recovery using the approved overlay Cargo mold with distinct tombstone/slot semantics

satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: low — four substantive Rust modules plus explicit flipping-point contract

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: Construction follows approved accepted tasks/overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind.zip (overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind) for verifier shape, flipping-point ablations, workspace+driver pipeline traps, and three-plus crate flipping-point discipline; reframed from overlay lowerdir repair to adversarial_generalization generation skew during filesystem recovery + state_recovery_crash_consistency with held-out perm_replay permutations. No promoted entry in docs/reference_tasks/index.json matches this exact profile combo; abi-rebuild-mismatch covers multi-crate regeneration discipline only.

realism_source.minimization_preserves: Durable tombstone index vs runtime mount probe divergence, intermediate gauge closure before replay completes, JSON fast path without tomb_wit cross-check, held-out ordering rows in perm_replay.toml
